story.title: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping
story.summary: The leaders of the global superpowers are expected to discuss the war in Iran, tariffs, AI and Taiwan during the two-day visit.
story.selection_reason: The meeting between Trump and Xi has the potential to impact global trade, technology, and geopolitical relationships, making it the most globally significant story.
